arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany praises his team for the balance they showed in 2-0 UCL victory over Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Looking for more thoughts and analysis on Bayern Munich big Champions League victory over Bayer Leverkusen? The number of away victories has grown to 3, however, following today’s 2-0 victory over Bayer Leverkusen and it was arguably the best Champions League away performance the club has put in this season.

arts.ttl: Raphaël Guerreiro is a potential candidate to be sold for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: In the background of Bayern Munich ’s push to claim both the Bundesliga and Champions League title in Vincent Kompany’s first season in charge of the club, there has been a great deal of activity with regards to squad planning. Joshua Kimmich is also on the brink of signing a new, long-term deal with the German Rekordmeister, which would complete the trio of key contracts that the club’s front office needed to tackle.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan coach Simone Inzaghi reacts to upcoming tie against “solid” Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Their manager, Simone Inzaghi, has had a tough time facing Bayern, losing all four games in his record against the Bavarians. Bayern Munich ’s glorious 5-0 aggregate victory over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League Round of 16 saw the club advance to the quarterfinals of the competition.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye bargain replacement for ironman wanted by Real Madrid and Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Such an outcome could see Dalot consider ending his seven-year stint at Old Trafford, particularly with United already looking at replacements and the emerging interest from some of Europe’s top sides. United will look to sign a right wing-back as a priority this summer, with Sporting’s Geovany Quenda believed to be Amorim’s top target, although reports in Italy have linked the club to Genoa’s Koni de Winter in recent days.

arts.ttl: Lothar Matthäus on Bayern Munich's European dreams, 'surprise package' Mainz and Borussia Dortmund's inconsistencies
arts.sum: The legendary Bayern Munich and Germany midfielder talks to bundesliga.com about his former club's European aims, why Mainz are this season's breath of fresh air and discusses Borussia Dortmund's hot-and-cold campaign. They’re on the right path, with an eight-point lead over Leverkusen in the Bundesliga and they’re in with a chance to reach the Champions League final in Munich on 31 May, which would, of course, be a home game – an additional incentive to get there.

arts.ttl: Santos address Neymar's future amid Barcelona, Bayern Munich speculation
arts.sum: Santos president Marcelo Teixeira hopes that the club will be able to sign Neymar to a fresh contract amid the recent links with Barcelona and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Aleksandar Pavlović could be out for another 2-6 weeks
arts.sum: Via a report from Bild, as captured by @iMiaSanMia, Bayern are looking to ease back Pavlović back very slowly even if it means he will be missed for a very extended period of time: Pavlović is expected to be sidelined for another two weeks - but if his blood tests subsequently raise even minimal concerns, his break could be extended to a total of 6 weeks.

arts.ttl: "He has improved a lot" - Nagelsmann about selecting Goretzka for Germany
arts.sum: 15 months after his last game for Germany, Goretzka is back with the German national team! DFB coach Nagelsmann has explained, why he gave the Bayern Munich player a call after not selecting him for over a year.

arts.ttl: Bayern’s midfield talent in doubt for Inter clash amid mononucleosis battle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlovic has been sidelined indefinitely after being diagnosed with mononucleosis, casting...

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern to stay risk-averse with Pavlovic
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany and Co. will take their time with an ailing Aleksandar Pavlovic ahead of the season run-in.
